overall.description: Static shot from a Harry Potter video game depicting the Great Hall with gothic vaulted ceilings, long wooden dining tables, and students in wizard robes. The scene features warm artificial lighting from chandeliers and remains largely unchanged throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with long dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed vantage point near the entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark wizard robes walking from left to right across the foreground

entered.detail: high ribbed stone arches with hanging iron chandeliers providing warm lighting
long dark wooden tables with attached benches arranged in parallel rows
grey stone tile flooring with large blue patterned rugs running between tables
dark wooden wainscoting on lower walls with grey stone above
rectangular framed paintings in gold frames mounted on the upper wall
elaborately decorated silver container with intricate engravings sitting on a side table

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic great hall with high vaulted ceilings and long wooden dining tables arranged in rows. Students in wizard robes sit at the tables conversing, while one student walks across the foreground from left to right. The hall is illuminated by warm chandelier light against stone walls and dark wood paneling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a gothic great hall where the warm glow of chandeliers illuminates a scene of scholarly activity. It begins with a wide view of the high vaulted ceilings and long wooden dining tables arranged in orderly rows. As the camera lingers, students in wizard robes are seen conversing in their seats, creating a sense of lived-in academic life. The scene then focuses on the foreground as a single student walks from left to right, cutting across the view of the stone walls and dark wood paneling. The shot finally settles into the quiet hum of the hall, preserving the unchanging warmth and grandeur of the environment.
